name: cv
description: Emmanuel Orozco's CV - Markdown to PDF builder

scripts.build:dev-rel: PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' mdpdf src/dev-rel.md --style styles/styles.css --border-left=38 --border-right=38 --border-top=48 --border-bottom=48 --format=Legal && mv src/dev-rel.pdf dist/
scripts.build:tech: PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' mdpdf src/tech.md --style styles/styles.css --border-left=38 --border-right=38 --border-top=48 --border-bottom=48 --format=Legal && mv src/tech.pdf dist/
scripts.build: npm run build:dev-rel && npm run build:tech
scripts.postinstall: echo 'Using system Chrome — PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD is set in scripts.'
